query:
SELECT task_count, COUNT(*) as num_groups FROM (
  SELECT at2.instanceId, at2.stageId, COUNT(*) as task_count
  FROM approvalTasks at2
  WHERE at2.status = 'pending'
  GROUP BY at2.instanceId, at2.stageId
) sub
GROUP BY task_count
ORDER BY task_count

  SELECT at2.instanceId, at2.stageId, COUNT(*) as task_count
